last_assistant_message: Code review complete for the authentication module. Found three issues: (1) `validate_token` does not check the `exp` claim before returning the decoded payload, which allows expired tokens through; (2) the password hashing rounds are hardcoded to 8, which is below the recommended minimum of 12 for bcrypt; (3) the session cookie is set without the `SameSite=Strict` attribute, leaving it open to CSRF in non-CORS contexts. All three are security-relevant and should be addressed before merging. No structural or style issues otherwise.
